title: How NOT to Summon a Demon Lord
sourceNotes: Source is a light novel by Yukiya Murasaki (AniList id 93368, on hiatus since 2022). anilistAnimeId is the 2018 TV season 1 (id 101004, 12 eps); season 2 'Ω/Omega' (id 117448, 10 eps) is a sequel, so episodes are cumulative (eps 13-22). Mapped to the ongoing manga adaptation (AniList id 86338, chapters null on AniList) using its main tankoubon chapter numbering, ~135 chapters as of June 2026. Per anime-to-manga guides, season 1 ends around Vol 9 Ch 41 and season 2 Ω ends around Vol 15 Ch 72.2; chapters 73+ are unadapted. Boundaries are approximate.

mappings.arc: Faltra City & the Demon Lord's Soul (Season 1)
